query:
Here is an establishment or group in the CHR sector (Cafés, Hotels, or Restaurants): TACO MEMO and its website http://www.tacomemo.com.
Optionnaly here is the address LILLE, FR and country code FR

I need to understand its current affiliation and group size.

1.  Determine whether this establishment is independent or part of a larger group
2.  If it is part of a group, determine the total number of locations owned by this group.

CRITICAL DEFINITIONS & CONSTRAINTS:

- Establishment Scope: Consider all food service businesses (restaurants, cafes, hotels, bakery, bars) the CHR sector.
- Input Flexibility: The name and domain provided may refer to a single location or the larger parent group. 
In all cases, these are the starting points for your search.
- Total Locations Calculation (Group definition): The term owns must be interpreted in the broadest sense. The total number of locations must be the sum of all sites directly owned/operate PLUS all sites operated via franchise agreements (Total = Owned + Franchised).
- Use the group's webpage centralizing all their locations, often called "our locations," "nos restaurants," or "store locator." to check the number of locations they display there.
- Final Result Selection: The final number of locations reported must be the highest total number found across all sources (webpage, store locator, reports, etc.). If only one location is found, the result is 1.
answer:
## Executive Summary

Taco Memo is an independent local restaurant brand operating in the Lille metropolitan area, rather than a subsidiary of a larger national or international CHR group. While the brand's official website presents the business as a single entity, official corporate registry reports indicate that the parent company has had up to **5 establishments** associated with the enterprise [TACO MEMO (MONS-EN-BARUL) Chiffre d'affaires, résultat, bilans sur SOCIETE.COM - 530898790](https://www.societe.com/societe/taco-memo-530898790.html). 

## Corporate Structure and Affiliation

Taco Memo operates as an independent entity with a localized corporate footprint. The brand has undergone significant recent corporate restructuring involving multiple legal entities:

*   **Primary Holding Entity:** The brand was founded on March 15, 2011, under the legal entity TACO MEMO, a Société à responsabilité limitée (SARL) registered under SIREN 530 898 790 with a social capital of 4,000.00 € [Société TACO MEMO à MONS-EN-BARUL (530898790)](https://www.societe.com/societe/taco-memo-530898790.html). The company has been managed by Guillaume FRANCOIS since March 19, 2011 [Société TACO MEMO à MONS-EN-BARUL (530898790)](https://www.societe.com/societe/taco-memo-530898790.html).
*   **Asset Transfers:** The group has actively sold off business assets (fonds de commerce) in recent years. On February 28, 2023, TACO MEMO sold its assets at 209 rue Gambetta to XIPE TOTEC SARL (SIREN 922 286 778) [Société TACO MEMO à MONS-EN-BARUL (530898790)](https://www.societe.com/societe/taco-memo-530898790.html). More recently, on July 10, 2025, TACO MEMO sold additional business assets to a company named MAMMA BUFALINA [Société TACO MEMO à MONS-EN-BARUL (530898790)](https://www.societe.com/societe/taco-memo-530898790.html).
*   **Headquarters:** Effective February 5, 2025, the registered headquarters of TACO MEMO transferred from 209 Rue Gambetta, Lille, to 4 Rue Saint-Exupéry, 59370 Mons-en-Barœul [Société TACO MEMO à MONS-EN-BARUL (530898790)](https://www.societe.com/societe/taco-memo-530898790.html). This new location is classified under activity 7010Z (Activities of head offices) [Société TACO MEMO à MONS-EN-BARUL (530898790)](https://www.societe.com/societe/taco-memo-530898790.html).

## Location Portfolio and Group Size

The official website (tacomemo.com) refers to the business in the singular as "notre restaurant" and does not feature a 'store locator' or 'franchise' page [TACO MEMO lille](https://www.tacomemo.com/index.html). However, applying the broadest definition of group size across all sources, official company reports for TACO MEMO (SIREN 530898790) indicate a total of **5 establishments** associated with the enterprise [TACO MEMO (MONS-EN-BARUL) Chiffre d'affaires, résultat, bilans sur SOCIETE.COM - 530898790](https://www.societe.com/societe/taco-memo-530898790.html). 

The known footprint includes a mix of active, closed, and administrative locations:
1.  **209 Rue Léon Gambetta, Lille:** The original location founded in 2011 [Taco Memo - Lille 59000 (Nord), 209 Rue Leon Gambetta , SIREN 530 898](https://fr.kompass.com/c/taco-memo/fr8226295/). It remains active for delivery on Deliveroo [Livraison Taco Memo à Lille - Wazemmes - Commandez avec Deliveroo](https://deliveroo.fr/fr/menu/lille/lille-wazemmes/taco-memo?day=today&rpos=0&time=ASAP) and is listed as an active secondary establishment in legal records [Société TACO MEMO : Chiffre d'affaires, statuts, extrait d'immatriculation](https://www.pappers.fr/entreprise/taco-memo-530898790).
2.  **29 Place des Reignaux, Lille:** Opened on January 31, 2019, across from the Lille-Flandres train station [Taco Memo débarque en face de la gare Lille-Flandres - 31/01/2019 - Vozer](https://www.vozer.fr/2019/01/31/taco-memo-debarque-en-face-de-la-gare-lille-flandres/). It is currently active on the official website [TACO MEMO lille](https://www.tacomemo.com/restaurant.html) and available for delivery in the Vieux-Lille area [Taco Memo - Lille Flandres delivery from Lille - Vieux-Lille - Order with Deliveroo](https://deliveroo.fr/en/menu/lille/lille-vieux-lille/taco-memo-lille-flandres).
3.  **Taco Memo - Food Market:** An active delivery-only or virtual location servicing the Lille - Epines Mont de Terre area via Deliveroo [Taco Memo - Food Market delivery from Lille - Epines Mont de Terre - Order with Deliveroo](https://deliveroo.fr/en/menu/lille/lille-epines-mont-de-terre/taco-memo-avant-gout).
4.  **80 Rue Pierre Mauroy (CC Des Tanneurs):** A former establishment listed as closed as of February 28, 2023 [TACO MEMO (MONS-EN-BARUL) Chiffre d'affaires, résultat, bilans sur SOCIETE.COM - 530898790](https://www.societe.com/societe/taco-memo-530898790.html).
5.  **Administrative Offices:** The group operates head office locations (activity 7010Z), currently at 4 Rue Saint-Exupéry in Mons-en-Barœul, and previously at 76 Rue Volta in Lambersart [Société TACO MEMO à MONS-EN-BARUL (530898790)](https://www.societe.com/societe/taco-memo-530898790.html).

## Brand Operations

Taco Memo specializes in authentic Mexican street food, with a kitchen team that received rigorous training in Mexico City [Taco Memo Lille 4.4 — Mexicain | Avis et Menu - PosDo](https://pos.do/fr/lille/restaurant/taco-memo). The menu features traditional specialties such as sopa azteca, mole, ceviche, and various tacos [Taco Memo Lille 4.4 — Mexicain | Avis et Menu - PosDo](https://pos.do/fr/lille/restaurant/taco-memo). 

To maintain margins against third-party delivery intermediaries, the restaurant utilizes a multi-channel business model encompassing direct sales, delivery, and click & collect [Taco Memo à Lille - menu et photos](https://www.eat-list.fr/lille-59000/restaurant-mexicain-11/taco-memo-83339). The brand also drives customer retention through a loyalty program called 'Find Me', which offers points for discounts and VIP experiences [Taco Memo Lille 4.4 — Mexicain | Avis et Menu - PosDo](https://pos.do/fr/lille/restaurant/taco-memo).

## Gaps and Limitations
*   **Operational Contradictions:** There is a discrepancy regarding the 29 Place des Reignaux location. While it is actively listed on the official website and Deliveroo, legal records from Pappers list the establishment as closed. 
*   **Franchise Status:** No evidence was found to suggest Taco Memo franchises its brand to third-party operators; all identified locations appear to be directly owned or previously owned by the parent SARL.
*   **Internal Dynamics:** One customer review noted "heavy tension" between managers, which may hint at internal operational challenges, though this cannot be definitively corroborated by corporate filings.
